title: Nursery Rhyme. IX. Historical
content:
The king of France, with twenty thousand men,
        Went up the hill, and then came down again;
        The king of Spain, with twenty thousand more,
        Climb'd the same hill the French had climb'd before.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. IX. Historical"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
